query:
SELECT id, financial_responsible_id, unit_id, price_per_report, starts_at, ends_at
FROM billing_system_unit_prices
WHERE financial_responsible_id = 120001
  AND unit_id = 210001
  AND starts_at <= NOW()
  AND (ends_at IS NULL OR ends_at >= NOW())
ORDER BY starts_at DESC
LIMIT 1;
